message:
bench(stream_hash): add Criterion benchmarks for homomorphic stream hashing (wa-283h4.6)

8 benchmark groups covering payload sizes, single-byte update, digest
comparison, homomorphic combine, incremental vs bulk, integrity checker,
reset, and serde. 30 benchmarks total, all passing.

Key results: digest compare ~2.6ns, combine ~35ns O(1), reset ~4.5ns,
throughput ~80 MiB/s (per-byte 128-bit modular arithmetic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -121,6 +121,10 @@ loom = "0.7"
 rcgen = { workspace = true }
 
 # Benchmarks
+[[bench]]
+name = "aggregator_merge"
+harness = false
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "pattern_detection"
 harness = false
@@ -418,6 +422,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "persistent_ds_bench"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "stream_hash_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
